lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar Present Simple positive, base verb iyo third-person -s/-es/-ies.
learningObjectives: s, es iyo ies kala dooro.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Base verb waa Falka asalka ah. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: We use Present Simple for routines.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Present Simple waxaan u isticmaalnaa jadwallada.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Present Simple waa Waqtiga caadada/jadwalka. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Work → works waa Work wuxuu noqdaa works. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Read → reads waa Read wuxuu noqdaa reads. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Go → goes waa Go wuxuu noqdaa goes. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Wash → washes waa Wash wuxuu noqdaa washes. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Watch → watches waa Watch wuxuu noqdaa watches. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Study → studies waa Study wuxuu noqdaa studies. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Play → plays waa Play wuxuu noqdaa plays. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Routine waa Jadwal joogto ah. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Habit waa Caado. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Schedule waa Jadwal. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Present Simple waxaa loo isticmaalaa caado, routine, jadwal iyo xaqiiqo fudud. I/you/we/they waxay qaataan base verb. He/she/it waxay qaataan -s ama -es. Consonant + y wuxuu noqdaa -ies: study→studies; vowel + y wuxuu qaataa -s: play→plays.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar do not/don’t iyo does not/doesn’t oo base verb la socda.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Do not waa Ma sameeyo/samayno. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Don't waa Soo gaabinta do not. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: He does not work at night.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Does not waa Ma sameeyo (he/she/it). Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Doesn't waa Soo gaabinta does not. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Negative sentence waa Jumlad diidmo ah. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Does not ka dib isticmaal go.

grammar.explanationSomali: I/you/we/they waxaa la socda do not/don’t. He/she/it waxaa la socda does not/doesn’t. Doesn’t ka dib falka waxaa lagu celiyaa base form.
grammar.rule: I/you/we/they + don’t + base; he/she/it + doesn’t + base
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + do/does not + base verb + complement
commonMistakesSomali: She doesn’t goes waa khalad; She doesn’t go ayaa sax ah.
He don't waa khalad; He doesn't ayaa sax ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar always ilaa never iyo booska ay jumladda ka galaan.
learningObjectives: Adverb-ka main verb ka hor dhig.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Always waa Mar kasta. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

Sometimes waa Mararka qaar. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Rarely waa Si dhif ah. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I never drink coffee at night.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Never waa Marnaba. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Every day waa Maalin kasta. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Every morning waa Subax kasta. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.
Every week waa Toddobaad kasta. Weedha waxaa loo isticmaalaa jadwal ama hawl maalinle ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely iyo never waxay sheegaan inta jeer. Waxay main verb ka hor yimaadaan: I usually study. Verb to be ka dib ayay yimaadaan: She is always early.
grammar.rule: Subject + frequency adverb + main verb; subject + be + frequency adverb
